title: Steamed Chalmburgers
description:
Delightfully devilish indeed...

A few important things:
- NEW PROPER YTP WILL BE OUT LATER THIS WEEK!
- Yes this is stupid but hopefully with a hint of genius.
- Apparently this idea hasn't been done, so I ran with it.  If I ripped anyone off, it is completely accidental and I'm sorry.
- This is using the sweet 60fps HD version from San2m.
- Original working title was "Steamed Hams but Chalmers becomes an unforgettable lunch"
- Turn on closed captions for some fun :D
